title: Verbesina repanda
taxonomy: Verbesina repanda is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant belongs to the genus Verbesina, which comprises about 70 species of flowering plants. The genus Verbesina is further classified into several subgroups, but the exact classification of Verbesina repanda is not specified. Verbesina repanda is native to tropical and subtropical regions, including parts of Central and South America. The classification of Verbesina repanda is subject to ongoing research and possible revisions.
